name: Ready Golf 4K
address: 8213 Highland Pointe Dr, West Chester Township, OH 45069
about: Ready Golf 4K is a golf simulator venue featuring three state-of-the-art bays powered by Trackman iO technology, offering 4K resolution graphics and comprehensive shot data tracking. The facility provides a flexible BYOB environment with private refrigerators in each bay, making it suitable for casual play, practice, and group events. Pricing is structured on a per-bay-hour basis with seasonal rates and multiple membership options available, including peak and off-peak plans with included hours and discounts on additional time.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade Trackman iO technology with dual radar and optical tracking
4K resolution graphics of world-famous golf courses
Flexible BYOB policy with private refrigerators in each bay
Comprehensive shot data tracking for game improvement
Convenient location near Cincinnati with easy highway access

food_and_drink.notes: Patrons can bring their own food to consume in the bays
Bring your own alcohol (BYOB) policy; private refrigerators provided in each bay

simulator_hardware.notes: Three state-of-the-art simulators with dual radar and high-speed optical tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The FAQ does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for information on club availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, Ready Golf 4K allows you to bring your own food and drink to enjoy while using the bays. Each bay features a bar top table with your own private refrigerator.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the exact time for 18 holes. Play duration depends on the number of players and the pace of play, as bays are booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically mention being kid-friendly or having junior-focused amenities. It is recommended to contact the venue directly to inquire about suitability for children.
